experimental_design: MtbYhhN overexpression in M.smeg vs vector control
overexpression of full-length MtbYhhN in M.smeg increased its survival within human macrophages by 2.6-fold compared to vector controls
factor_value: overexpression of full-length MtbYhhN in M.smeg
number_of_fractions: Overall, these steps resulted in 219-fold purification, a yield of 12% and a final specific activity of 14.2 μmoles/min/mg of total protein.
number_of_biological_replicates: We infected human MDMs with M.smeg transformant strains containing either empty VC or 261-aa protein–expressing construct.
number_of_samples: We infected human MDMs with M.smeg transformant strains containing either empty VC or 261-aa protein–expressing construct.
